headline: Declan Rice
body: Declan Rice, Marc Guehi & Reece James aren’t taking part in England training today in Kansas City - the FA say they are following “individual programmes elsewhere”. Jordan Henderson at the team hotel recovering from surgery 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿
raw_text: Declan Rice, Marc Guehi & Reece James aren’t taking part in England training today in Kansas City - the FA say they are following “individual programmes elsewhere”. Jordan Henderson at the team hotel recovering from surgery 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿
